attempts.strategy: Build the cosyzygy short complex Zⁿ→Kⁿ→Zⁿ⁺¹ and prove it short exact: mono_f from iCycles a mono, epi_g from ExactAt(n+1) ⇒ Epi(toCycles), exact from iCycles being a kernel of toCycles.

Routed through epi_of_isColimit_cofork after several false starts (Cofork.IsColimit.epi_of_isZero_of_isColimit was an unknown constant).

next_steps: Leaf closed. Feeds the TARGET-3 staircase as the SES (Sₙ).

attempts.strategy: Identify G(Zⁿ) = G(cycles n) with cycles n of the applied complex G(K), using that a finite-limit-preserving G maps the kernel fork of iCycles to the kernel fork of the applied complex.
attempts.lean_error: mapCyclesIso requires [F.PreservesLeftHomologyOf S] = preserve a colimit too; f_* only preserves finite limits
attempts.insight: Mathlib's ShortComplex.mapCyclesIso is UNUSABLE here (needs PreservesLeftHomologyOf, i.e. preserve a colimit); a left-exact functor only preserves finite limits.

attempts.strategy: Use Limits.isLimitForkMapOfIsLimit' to map the kernel fork through G, then conePointUniqueUpToIso.
attempts.insight: isLimitForkMapOfIsLimit' is the clean substitute when only finite-limit preservation is available. Compatibility lemma gCosyzygyIsoCocycles_hom_iCycles via conePointUniqueUpToIso_hom_comp at WalkingParallelPair.zero.

attempts.strategy: For n=m+1: Hⁿ(G(K)) is coker(toCycles); transport via gCosyzygyIsoCocycles to coker(G.map(K.toCycles)). Needs a naturality square gCosyzygyIsoCocycles_toCycles.
attempts.code_tried: rw [← G.map_comp] / simp only [← Functor.map_comp] on goal G.map f ≫ G.map g (the toCycles/iCycles compatibility)
attempts.lean_error: Tactic `rewrite` failed: Did not find an occurrence of the pattern G.map ?f ≫ G.map ?g (silently fails despite literal LHS)
attempts.insight: ← G.map_comp / simp ← Functor.map_comp SILENTLY FAIL on a goal whose LHS is literally G.map f ≫ G.map g when the rest contains a mapped-complex term — instance/HasHomology-diamond reducibility quirk.

attempts.strategy: Prove the G.map _ ≫ G.map _ = G.map (_ ≫ _) fact in an ISOLATED have on a clean goal, then close with term-mode (toCycles_i as a term, not rw/simp).

attempts.insight: Workaround: isolate the map_comp rewrite on a fresh goal, use toCycles_i as a TERM. See gCosyzygyIsoCocycles_toCycles.

attempts.strategy: Assemble cohomologyAppliedResolutionIso via homologyIsCokernel ≪≫ cokernel.mapIso using the naturality square; degree-0 via gHomologyZeroIso = gCosyzygyIsoCocycles K 0 ≪≫ isoHomologyπ₀.
attempts.code_tried: cokernel.mapIso _ (G.map (K.toCycles m (m+1))) (Iso.refl _) (G.gCosyzygyIsoCocycles K (m+1)).symm (by simp [Iso.symm_hom, Iso.refl_hom, Iso.comp_inv_eq]; simp [gCosyzygyIsoCocycles_toCycles])
attempts.insight: rw [Category.id_comp] fails on 𝟙 (GK.X m) ≫ G.map f because GK.X m is not syntactically G.obj (K.X m); a full simp closes via defeq. Both decls axiom-clean.
